name: BoundingBox
description: Identifies the bounding box around the label, face, text or object.

Width.description: Width of the bounding box as a ratio of the overall image width.

Height.description: Height of the bounding box as a ratio of the overall image height.

Left.description: Left coordinate of the bounding box as a ratio of overall image width.

Top.description: Top coordinate of the bounding box as a ratio of overall image height.
